name: openclaw-security
description: Security audit platform for OpenClaw Cloud deployments

scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/scanner-core/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p apps/extension/tsconfig.json
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test
scripts.db:create: cd apps/web && bunx wrangler d1 create openclaw-security-db
scripts.db:migrate:local: cd apps/web && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply openclaw-security-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd apps/web && bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply openclaw-security-db --remote
